name: Fibonacci (DP)
description: Computes Fibonacci numbers using a bottom-up DP table, showing how each value is derived from the previous two.
intuition: Instead of recomputing fib(n-1) and fib(n-2) recursively (exponential time), store every sub-result once. Each cell costs O(1) and we only pay it once — the textbook example of memoization turning exponential into linear.
